creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
On 9.1-RELEASE with portsnap of 20130104, port graphics/xsane fails to build because the
sane-config script (installed by graphics/sane-backends) has a null PKG_CONFIG_PATH.  This
patch initializes the script's variable to the same value as in tools/Makefile.in.

How-To-Repeat: portmaster graphics/xsane
watch it fail
